text:
I have not the -CURRENT version, hovewer at least in 4.6.2-RELEASE
at least 1.-st (mmap(): Invalid argument) trouble is still.
  (If nobody neither reports
doscmd problems, nor solves it during such many years, doscmd is not
actual, possibly ? In any case removing so buggy item from the core
system is right, I think.)

    Isupov A.
